RF Rock.name: RF Rock
RF Rock.following_figure_names: Back Corte, LF Rock, Tango LF Rock, Tango RF Rock, Reverse Outside Swivel, Rock Turn
RF Rock.notes:
Rocks may be danced down LOD or DC
When a RF Rock follows a LF Rock, the first step of the RF Rock will be down LOD. When a Closed Finish follows a LF Rock the first step of the Closed Finish will be DC

comments: Maintain the body position, rotate only on the man's back steps.

steps.action: Transfer weight forward to LF in CBMP

comments: Styling option: simply staying left, or, look at each other. More neutral position, so you have more to "give" in the next Corte

steps.action: Transfer weight back to RF in CBMP
comments: Very upward, strong stretch on right side.

LF Rock.name: LF Rock
LF Rock.preceding_figure_names: Back Corte, Basic Reverse Turn, Brush Tap, Closed Promenade, Natural Twist Turn, Open Finish, Open Promenade, Open Reverse Turn, Lady In Line, Open Reverse Turn, Lady Outside, Outside Swivel, Progressive Side Step Reverse Turn, Promenade Link
LF Rock.following_figure_names: Open Finish, Closed Finish, RF Rock
LF Rock.notes:
LF Rock may be danced down LOD or DC
When a LF Rock follows a RF Rock, the first step of the LF Rock will be down LOD. When a Closed Finish follows a LF Rock the first step of the Closed Finish will be DC

comments: Maintain the body position, rotate only on the man's back steps.

steps.action: Transfer weight forward to RF in R side leading

comments: R side if very "up" to Man.

steps.action: Transfer weight back to LF L side leading
comments: Give center to Man and leave head behind.
